title: OTG: Open Terrain Generator Continued
body:
As [Open Terrain Generator](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/open-terrain-generator) focuses on development for current versions of Minecraft this project will continue it's development for 1.12.2 specifically.

**Features:**

. Modded mob support for biomes

. Disabled pregen for dimensions

. Fixed custom grass colors

. Various performance enhancements

. OTG's 1.16.5 river system backported

**Documentation:**

[Adding modded mobs to biomes](https://modrinth.com/)

> SpawnCreatures: [{"mob": "oe:crab", "weight": 4, "min": 3, "max": 3}]
